title: fraxinus raibocarpa
intro: Fraxinus raibocarpa, also known as Manchineel tree or Fraxinus, is a species of plant in the family Oleaceae, native to tropical Central and South America. The medicinal properties of Fraxinus raibocarpa include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of using Fraxinus raibocarpa include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve skin health, and act as an antifungal agent. Fraxinus raibocarpa can be prepared as an herbal remedy through infusions, decoctions, or extracts, making it a versatile and useful plant for traditional medicine.
